segments.text_en: Descent initiated and divine powers gathered
evidence: From the great heaven she set her mind on the great below.
Inana abandoned heaven, abandoned earth, and descended to the underworld.
She collected the divine powers and grasped them in her hand.
She covered her body with a pala dress, the garment of ladyship.
When I have arrived in the underworld, make a lament for me on the ruin mounds.
Don’t let your precious metal be alloyed there with the dirt of the underworld.
Father Enki, the lord of great wisdom, knows about the life-giving plant and the life-giving water.
Don’t neglect the instructions I gave you.
she pushed aggressively on the door of the underworld.
Neti, the chief doorman of the underworld, answers holy Inanna: “Who are you?”
“I am Inanna going to the east.”
“Because lord Gud-gal-ana... has died; in order to have his funeral rites observed
She has collected the divine powers and grasped them in her hand.
When she heard this, Ereškigal slapped the side of her thigh.
Let the seven gates of the underworld be bolted.
As for her, after she has entered, and crouched down and had her clothes removed, they will be carried away.
“Come on, Inanna, and enter.”
the turban, headgear for the open country, was removed from her head.
Inanna, you must not open your mouth against the rites of the underworld.
They looked at her—it was the look of death!
The afflicted woman was turned into a corpse!
And the corpse was hung on a hook.
After 3 days and 3 nights had passed, her minister Ninšubur... carried out the instructions
“Father Enlil, don’t let anyone kill your daughter in the underworld.
“My daughter craved the great heaven and she craved the great below as well.
“Father Enki, don’t let anyone kill your daughter in the underworld.
“What has my daughter done? She has me worried.

segments.text_en: Creation of rescuers and empathy strategy
evidence: He removed some dirt from the tip of his fingernail and created the kur-gar.
To the kur-gar he gave the life-giving plant. To the gala-tura he gave the life-giving water.
you are to say “You are troubled, our mistress, oh your liver.”
Whether it is that of our king, whether it is that of our queen, give it to us.
1 of you sprinkle on it the life-giving plant and 1 the life-giving water.
They flitted through the door like flies.
they said to her “You are troubled, our mistress, oh your heart.”
They said to her: “Whether it is that of our king or that of our queen, give it to us.”
1 of them sprinkled on it the life-giving plant and 1 the life-giving water.
And thus Inanna rose up.

segments.text_en: Ascent and demonic demand for substitute
evidence: “Who has ever ascended from the underworld, has ascended unscathed from the underworld?
If Inanna is to ascend from the underworld, let her provide a substitute for herself.”
while the small demons, like a reed enclosure, and the big demons... restrained her
They eat no fish, they eat no leeks.
“Inanna, proceed to your city, we will take her back.”
She did not neglect the orders I gave her.
She brought me back to life. How could I turn her over to you?
Šara, in his own city, threw himself at her feet. He had sat in the dust
“Šara is my singer, my manicurist and my hairdresser. How could I turn him over to you?
Let us go on. Let us go on to the great apple tree in the plain of Kulaba.”

segments.text_en: Condemnation of Dumuzi and his escape
evidence: There was Dumuzi clothed in a magnificent garment and seated magnificently on a throne.
She looked at him, it was the look of death.
“How much longer? Take him away.” Holy Inanna gave Dumuzi the shepherd into their hands.
The lad raised his hands to heaven, to Utu:
Utu turned Dumuzi’s hands into snake’s hands... Dumuzi escaped his demons.

segments.text_en: Mourning, fly's aid, and final decree
evidence: Holy Inanna wept bitterly for her husband.
A fly speaks to holy Inanna: “If I show you where your man is, what will be my reward?”
Now Inanna decreed this fate and thus it came to be.
You for half the year and your sister for half the year
Thus holy Inanna gave Dumuzi as a substitute
